articles.title: Scientists Build Living Robots With Nervous Systems
articles.summary: Engineers have long tried to mimic life. They’ve built machine-learning algorithms modeled after the human brain , designed machines that walk like dogs or fly like insects , and taught robots to adapt, however clumsily , to the world around them.
